description: Create a secure HTTP Webhook channel in NextGen Connect named 'CloudBook_Webhook'. The channel must use an HTTP Listener on port 6675 as the source. Implement a JavaScript Source Filter to validate incoming requests by comparing the 'X-Signature' header (containing an HMAC-SHA256 hex digest of the raw request body) against a calculated HMAC using the shared secret 'HealthSecure2025'. Messages with missing or invalid signatures must be rejected. Configure the destination as a File Writer to /home/ga/appointments/ using the filename '${message.messageId}.json' to store the raw JSON payload.
